turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, umm, I had an appointment tomorrow morning and I need to, uh, cancel it actually.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sure, I can help with that. May I have your name and registered phone number?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: It's Rohit Sharma. Phone number is 9765432100.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, Mr. Sharma. I can see your appointment with Dr. Ajay Kulkarni tomorrow at 10:30 AM. Would you like to cancel it completely or reschedule to another date?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Just cancel for now. I'll call back when I'm free next week maybe.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understood. Your appointment has been cancelled. Whenever you're ready, feel free to call us back and we'll find a suitable slot. Is there anything else I can do for you?
